name: promotion-check
prompt:
Scan all files in vault/learnings/ and read their YAML frontmatter. Find entries where recurrence-count >= 3 AND status is NOT 'promoted' AND status is NOT 'archived'. For each qualifying entry: (1) Read the full file, (2) Format a promotion request as a Discord notification with the learning title, pattern-key, recurrence count, and a summary of what was learned. Write the notification to heartbeat-tasks/pending-notifications.jsonl in this format: {"channel": "notifications", "task": "promotion-check", "timestamp": "<now>", "summary": "**Promotion candidate:** <title>
Pattern: <pattern-key> (seen <N> times)
Learning: <summary>

Reply in #notifications with 'approve <id>' or 'reject <id>'"} — one line per candidate. If no candidates found, write nothing. Be concise.
